docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY DELEON, JAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT ALMAN ELSY D.B.A. TRANSPORTES SALVADORENO SUCHITLAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION L.R. 18.0 SENT TO ELSY ALMAN RETURNED.
